mapper.select:
SELECT rnum, orderId, orderDate, orderAmount, paymentAmount, amountDiff FROM ( SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT O.order_id AS orderId, DATE_FORMAT(O.order_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS orderDate, O.pay_total_amt AS orderAmount, SUM(L.pay_amt) AS paymentAmount, (O.pay_total_amt - SUM(L.pay_amt)) AS amountDiff FROM tb_order O INNER JOIN tb_order_item L ON O.order_id = L.order_id CROSS JOIN (SELECT @rownum := 0) R WHERE O.del_yn = 'N'
AND O.order_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchBgnDe}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND O.order_dt <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDe}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY O.order_id, O.pay_total_amt HAVING O.pay_total_amt != SUM(L.pay_amt) ORDER BY O.order_dt DESC, O.order_id DESC ) A ) B LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT O.order_id FROM tb_order O INNER JOIN tb_order_item L ON O.order_id = L.order_id WHERE O.del_yn = 'N'
AND O.order_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchBgnDe}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND O.order_dt <= STR_TO_DATE(#{searchEndDe}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY O.order_id, O.pay_total_amt HAVING O.pay_total_amt != SUM(L.pay_amt) ) T
